sentences.arabic: كَشَفَتِ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْعِلْمِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ عَنِ الدَّوْرِ الْجَوْهَرِيِّ الَّذِي تَلْعَبُهُ الْبَكْتِيرْيَا النَّافِعَةُ فِي الْأَمْعَاءِ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْجِهَازِ الْمَنَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Savremene naučne studije otkrile su suštinsku ulogu koju korisne bakterije u crijevima igraju u zdravlju imunološkog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Recent scientific studies have revealed the essential role that beneficial gut bacteria play in the health of the immune system.

sentences.arabic: فَإِذَا مَا تَنَاوَلَ الْفَرْدُ غِذَاءً مُتَوَازِنًا غَنِيًّا بِالْأَلْيَافِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ، فَإِنَّهُ يُعَعَزِّزُ مِنْ تَنَوُّعِ هَذِهِ الْكَائِنَاتِ الدَّقِيقَةِ الْمُفِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ako pojedinac konzumira uravnoteženu ishranu bogatu prirodnim vlaknima, on podstiče raznolikost ovih korisnih mikroorganizama.
sentences.translationEn: If an individual consumes a balanced diet rich in natural fibers, they enhance the diversity of these beneficial microorganisms.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَى النَّقِيضِ مِنْ ذَلِكَ، تُؤَدِّي الْأَطْعِمَةُ الْمُعَالَجَةُ وَالْمَشْبَعَةُ بِالدُّهُونِ إِلَى حُدُوثِ الْتِهَابَاتٍ قَدْ تَتَطَوَّرُ إِلَى أَمْرَاضٍ أَيْضِيَّةٍ خَطِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nasuprot tome, prerađena hrana zasićena mastima dovodi do upala koje se mogu razviti u ozbiljne metaboličke bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: On the contrary, processed foods saturated with fats lead to inflammation that may develop into serious metabolic diseases.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعْتَقَدُ أَنَّ هُنَاكَ ارْتِبَاطًا وَثِيقًا بَيْنَ صِحَّةِ الْجِهَازِ الْهَضْمِيِّ وَالْحَالَةِ الْمِزَاجِيَّةِ لِلْإِنْسَانِ عَبْرَ مَا يُسَمَّى بِالْمِحْوَرِ الدِّمَاغِيِّ الْمِعَوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Vjeruje se da postoji bliska veza između zdravlja probavnog sistema i čovjekovog raspoloženja putem takozvane ose crijeva-mozak.
sentences.translationEn: It is believed that there is a close link between digestive health and a person's mood via the so-called gut-brain axis.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَنْبَغِي لَنَا إِعَادَةُ النَّظَرِ فِي عَادَاتِنَا الْغِذَائِيَّةِ وَاعْتِبَارُ الطَّعَامِ دَوَاءً يَقِي الْجَسَدَ مِنْ تَبِعَاتِ الشَّيْخُوخَةِ الْمُبَكِّرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga bismo trebali preispitati svoje prehrambene navike i smatrati hranu lijekom koji štiti tijelo od posljedica prijevremenog starenja.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we should reconsider our dietary habits and consider food as a medicine that protects the body from the consequences of premature aging.
